title: Bookkeeping Disaster
hook: Zinriss' old accounting catastrophe still casts a shadow over his life in Alkenstar.
playerSummary: The fallout from Zinriss' bookkeeping mistake is still driving debt, reputation trouble, and pressure from the past.
gmTruth: Use this thread for debts, reputation damage, the question of whether Zinriss was merely careless or manipulated, and any pressure that forces him to confront the numbers he ran from.
